json_schema.name: job_posting_extraction
json_schema.description: Structured extraction of a job posting from rendered HTML into a title plus Markdown-formatted description.

title.description: The exact job title as it appears on the page. Empty string if no title is present.

markdown.description: The extracted job posting content formatted as clean Markdown. Uses '##' headings for sections, bullet points for lists, and excludes HTML tags, tables, images, and links.
